final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a product launch campaign featuring 长安起源Q06.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic, high-impact visual aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a wide landscape layout with title and subtitle text prominently placed over the background
Subject: must include 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a translucent, immersive, visually striking atmosphere — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic, awe-inspiring atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with 长安 brand identity — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sense of depth and translucency in the background — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (primary title, large), "9月正式上市" (subtitle, secondary)
Constraints: must preserve a clean PPT cover hierarchy: background image + title + subtitle
Avoid:
